prestazioni: Engine: N63B44T3 (6.75L V12 twin-turbo) – Full billet aluminum crankshaft upgrade by Manley Performance with 4340 steel connecting rods and forged Mahle pistons (10.5:1 compression ratio) for 850hp/950Nm on 98 RON fuel, paired with a custom titanium valvetrain by Schrick (280°/284° camshafts, 12.5mm lift) and a bespoke Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (1.25 A/R turbine housing, 88mm compressor) with a Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate and a PWR 1500hp-rated intercooler core (bar-and-plate, 4.5" thick).

Drivetrain: ZF 8HP95 8-speed transmission reinforced with a Sonnax billet valve body and a Precision Industries 4500-stall triple-disc torque converter, mated to a Quaife ATB helical LSD in the rear axle (3.27:1 final drive ratio) with a custom carbon-fiber driveshaft by GKN Driveline. Full transmission and differential cooling via a Setrab 50-row oil cooler with dual SPAL 16" fans.

Suspension/Handling: Full Ohlins TTX46 coilover system with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom-machined aluminum top mounts by Radium Engineering, and a bespoke anti-roll bar kit by H&R (28mm front, 25mm rear) with spherical bearings. Chassis reinforcement via a T45 steel roll cage by Custom Cages (FIA-spec, 6-point with integrated harness bars) and a carbon-fiber front strut brace by Varis.
estetica: Aero: Full custom carbon-fiber body kit by Novitec Torado (Rolls-Royce’s official tuning partner), including a 3-piece front splitter with integrated canards (CFRP, 3.5° angle of attack), a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (electrically adjustable via a MoTeC PDM16), and a fixed rear wing (NACA 63A012 airfoil, 1.2m span, 300mm chord) with a drag reduction system (DRS) actuated by a Bosch Rexroth servo motor. Underbody: Full flat floor with vortex generators by Vorsteiner and a rear diffuser featuring 4 active flaps (controlled by a Bosch ECU for dynamic downforce adjustment).

Wheels/Tires: Forged 23" x 11.5J (front) / 23" x 13J (rear) monoblock wheels by BBS FI-R (custom offset +35mm front, +45mm rear) with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (345/25 R23 front, 375/20 R23 rear). Brake system: AP Racing 6-piston monobloc calipers (front) and 4-piston (rear) with 420mm (front) / 380mm (rear) carbon-ceramic rotors by Surface Transforms (ST-1000 material, 3D-printed cooling vanes) and custom titanium pistons. Brake lines: Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel braided lines with titanium fittings.

Interior/Exterior Finishes: Full bespoke interior by Hermès (Epsom leather with «Arcadia» motif embroidery, hand-painted wood veneer by Rolls-Royce’s «The St. James’s Workshop» with 24k gold inlays). Exterior: Custom «Liquid Silver» paint by Standox (3-stage process with 12 layers, including a «chameleon» flake that shifts to «Emerald Green» under direct sunlight) with a matte clear coat by PPG. Lighting: Full LED matrix headlights by Osram (12,000-lumen output, adaptive beam pattern) with a custom DRL signature (fiber-optic «starlight» effect, 1,000 individual points of light).
